form.formComment: At the last outing finished 7th in a Class 3/4 on March 25 over 457m at this track behind Opawa Fannin beaten 9 lengths (26.38). Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 4.5 lengths win at Manawatu over 457m (25.54) beating Jilliby Finale in Class 2/3 on April 2. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 0.6 lengths at Manawatu over 457m (25.70) beating Crossfit Queen in Class 2/3 on April 2. Has a slick 26.09 PB at this course and distance. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Has finished eighth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 457m. Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.80) in a Class 2, finishing a 8 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from seven starts. Must respect.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 390m at this track beaten 11 lengths (23.40) behind Fairway Flyer in a Class 2 on March 31. Hit the frame last time but will need to improve further.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on March 9 at Addington over 295m. Last start was fifth over 295m in 17.39, behind Homebush Harold. Should be around the mark.
